title: polystichum cystostegium
intro: Polystichum cystostegium, also known as the autumn fern or autumn fern polypody, is a species of fern native to East Asia, characterized by its glossy, dark green fronds and ability to retain its foliage throughout the winter months. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Polystichum cystostegium include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often dried and used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties.
